name: color
description: Palette name or hex / `rgb(...)` / `r,g,b`. When unset, the neutral gray-2 token is used.

name: shape
description: `default` squircle, `circle` perfect round, `square` for kit-radius corners.

name: historyGradient
description: When `history` is set, use the Instagram-style three-stop gradient ring.

name: loading
description: Full-cover overlay with a two-ring spinner.

name: writing
description: Badge renders a bouncing three-dot "typing" indicator.

name: badge
description: Show the default dot badge (only when no `badgeContent` snippet is provided).

name: size
description: Width and height in px. Number or numeric string.

name: text
description: Letter fallback. String form drives deterministic initials and font scaling.

name: badgeContent
description: Rich badge content. Overrides the default dot when provided.

name: icons
description: Strip of action icons hugging the avatar edge; each icon is rendered as a cut-out badge.

name: iconsPlacement
description: Layout for the icon strip. `vertical` hugs the right edge, `horizontal` the bottom.
